falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4200 on any single day within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A break below the August 2024 lows would invalidate the 78% pattern match to bottom_2024_aug, proving this is not a comparable bottoming structure and the UNKNOWN verdict should shift to BEARISH

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 2 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained volatility spike above the August 2024 panic peak would demonstrate systemic stress absent in that bottom, falsifying the pattern match and indicating a different macro regime

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y-2Y Treasury yield curve un-inverts and steepens by more than 50 basis points (spread rises above -0.10%)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Rapid curve steepening typically signals recession realization or banking stress, which did not occur during the August 2024 bottom, breaking the pattern's foundational macro conditions

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
